code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut remaining = n
  mut result = ""
  while remaining >= 10
    result = "#{result}X"
    remaining = remaining - 10
  end
  if remaining >= 9
    result = "#{result}IX"
    remaining = remaining - 9
  end
  if remaining >= 5
    result = "#{result}V"
    remaining = remaining - 5
  end
  if remaining >= 4
    result = "#{result}IV"
    remaining = remaining - 4
  end
  while remaining >= 1
    result = "#{result}I"
    remaining = remaining - 1
  end
  result
end

println(to_roman(4))
println(to_roman(9))
println(to_roman(27))
println(to_roman(39))
